claim_boundary: This confirmation uses official held-out Camelyon17 patients from hospitals represented in training. It tests supported multi-hospital patient shift, not transport to the unsupported official test hospital.
design: registered follow-up to the known one-source external-hospital impossibility; no new multi-hospital outcomes were inspected
family: two token tables for each of five registered seeds
model: fixed torchvision ResNet-18 ImageNet-v1 penultimate features from the inherited frozen store
name: MOSAIC Camelyon17 multi-hospital confirmation lock v1

roles.bridge_and_diagnostic: registered two-thirds/one-third stratified split of official validation rows in hospitals 0, 3, and 4
roles.construction_and_reference: disjoint balanced samples from official training rows in hospitals 0, 3, and 4

runtime_semantics: one persistent sampled release token per immutable image
stopping_rule: Run all five seeds. Do not replace the frozen model, feature store, hospital grouping, roles, caps, seeds, alphabet, thresholds, confidence allocation, or diagnostic folds.
